# Free Word Search Puzzle Generator

Level:

BasicIntermediateAdvanced

Worksheet Header:

NoneName OnlyName and DateName and PeriodName and Number

Puzzle Title:


Puzzle Creator: (example: Mrs. Jones)

Alphabetize Word List:

YesNo

Letter Case Style:

UPPERCASE (recommended)lowercase

Enter your word list in the box below.

- Use a comma or press enter between words.
- Minimum word length: 3 letters
- Maximum word length: 16 letters
- Recommended number of words: 20

Level - Intermediate

· 18 x 12 grid

· Words hidden across, down, and diagonally

· No backwards words

· Medium font size

· Recommended for grades 2 - 4

Please note:

- There may be a limit to the number and lengths of words hidden. If you have too many words or your words are too long, they may be left out of the puzzle. Please check your puzzle carefully to make sure all of your words are there.
- Our word search generator uses a basic word filter to prevent the accidental, random creation of offensive words. When you create your puzzle, please check it over it carefully to be sure unintended words were not added by our random letter generator.

STW members are able to save their worksheets. You are not currently logged in and will not be able to save this file.

Create Worksheet

Sample Free Word Search Puzzle Generator Images

Below are two examples of beginner and intermediate Word Searches! The Word Search Maker creates the puzzle page as well as a solution page.

![Word Search Maker](https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/images/preview/gen_wordsearch001.jpg)

![Word Search Maker Solution](https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/images/preview/gen_wordsearch002.jpg)

![Free Word Search Puzzle Generator](https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/images/preview/gen_wordsearch2001.jpg)

![Free Word Search Puzzle Generator Solution](https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/images/preview/gen_wordsearch2002.jpg)

## Create Customized Word Search Puzzles for Free!

Our free word search generator makes it simple to create and print unlimited custom puzzles online. Teachers, parents, and puzzle enthusiasts use this tool to design fun activities for the classroom, home, or special events. Whether you're searching for a word search maker, printable puzzle creator, word find generator, or make-your-own word search PDF tool, you'll find everything you need here. Choose from basic, intermediate, or advanced word searches so every learner can enjoy a challenge at just the right level.

This tool is perfect for making custom word searches for kids and adults. Enter your own spelling words, vocabulary terms, or themed word lists, and instantly download a ready-to-use printable word search puzzle. Many people search for phrases like create a word search for kids, online word puzzle generator, or free printable word find maker, and this generator delivers all of those options. Use it to design educational worksheets, rainy-day activities, or even personalized word search puzzles for parties and family fun.

## Frequently Asked Questions About Our Word Search Generator

Can I make printable word searches with answer keys?

Yes! When you create a puzzle with our free word search generator, you'll also have the option to include an answer key. This makes it easy for teachers and parents to check solutions quickly, whether the puzzle is basic, intermediate, or advanced.

How do I create harder word searches?

Our tool lets you choose from easy, medium, and challenging word search levels. For advanced puzzles, you can include longer words, diagonal and backward word placements, and larger grids to keep older students and adults engaged.

Is this really a free word search creator?

Absolutely! You can make unlimited free printable word searches online with no sign-up required. Many users find us while searching for a DIY word search, custom puzzle maker, or free word find generator, and our tool provides all of these options.

Can I make word searches for kids?

Yes, you can quickly design kid-friendly word searches using sight words, spelling lists, or vocabulary themes. The easy level option keeps word search puzzles simple and fun for younger learners.

You can now create online NEW!PLAYABLE and NEW!SHAREABLE word search puzzles! Or make PDF's, Images, or just print them. [Word Search Generator](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) Title: Instructions: **Ads Blocked:** _That's OK!_ You are viewing a 'AD-Free' version of our site that has limited functionality **You will get a MUCH IMPROVED application by simply allowing our advertisements to show!** If you are completely against ads, we do have a [fee supported](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) site that contains no ads, and also offers a few extras over our ad supported site! BEFORE puchasing anything or leaving the site, may we suggest turning off your ad blocker and make 1 worksheet just see what you're missing by trying the ad supported version - we think you'll find it is well worth it! Heart24x31 Fish30x30 Triangle40x40 Checker58x59 Spiral40x36 Feet29x30 Paw ShapesLetters A-ZNumbers 0-9 ↑Brand New Options! Upload or Design your own Shapes! Forward and backward Backward words only Forward words only Diagonal words Diagonal words only No diagonal words Up and down words Up and down words only No up and down words Word Orientation EnglishAlbanianArabicArmenianChineseCzechDanishDutchGermanFinnishFrenchGreekHebrewIrishItalianJapanese-Hira-Kata-MixJapanese-HiraganaJapanese-KatakanaJapanese-KanjiPolishPortugueseRussianSpanishNumbersLanguage RedBlueGreenOrangePurplePinkLight BlueMulti (Rainbow) X C Q L P A W S Z T M O Loop Style Coloring Hide word list Sort word list alphabetically BottomRightPlace Word List 1 column2 columns3 columns4 columns5 columnsList words in **Puzzle Problems?** [Click here for solutions!](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) **Here are solutions to 95% of the problems people have! Click question to see answer** Where is the answer sheet? 1. All of our worksheets have answer sheets. After creating the worksheet, there is a blue menu next to the puzzle/worksheet on the left side of the window. At the TOP of this menu click on "Answer KEY" to get the answers. ![Click here for the Answers](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/includes/save-puzzle-include-answers.webp) 2. **Don't see this blue menu on the left AFTER creating your worksheet?** This happens for 2 reasons. [Click here to read why.](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) 1. Your browser is low on memory and javascript has shut down in the browser. Usually caused by any of the following: too many browser tabs open, too many apps installed (or a poorly coded app installed), or you just haven't rebooted the computer in a long time. REMEDY: Reboot your computer and try again. This restores browser memory and restarts the javascript engine. 2. If you are running an Ad Blocker (like Adblock, Adblock Plus, uBlock, etc), this can break our site and cause the blue menu NOT to show. REMEDY 1: Whitelist our site in the ad blocker, refresh page (sometimes a full computer reboot is required) and try again. If banner ads are not showing, you are still blocking them. OR REMEDY 2. You can purchase a premium subscription and no ads will show and you will have access to options in the blue menu. How come I can only add 10 lines? (2 reasons) 1. Browser is low on memory and the javascript engine has shut down in the browser (usually caused by too many browser tabs open or a badly coded extension that is installed and leaking memory). REMEDY: Rebooting the computer will resore memory to the browser. Alternatively, if you know your way around Task Manager (CTRL+ALT+DEL), you can shut down ALL instances of the browser using Task Manager, then restart the browser and try again. 2. If you only have 10 lines and you see grey or pink boxes asking you to turn off your ad blocker, you need to turn off your ad blocker to get more lines. Still having the problem after stopping your ad blocker from blocking ads? Be sure to REFRESH the page. If after whitelisting and refreshing the page you _still can only add 10 lines_, you need to restart your computer. AdBlockers cause numerous problems on our site so make sure ads are showing (this sometimes requires computer reboot!) and then try again. We have 3 options for our users: a. Advertisement Free (generally 10 lines - depends on which puzzle maker), b. Ad Supported (generally 30 lines), and c. Premium Paid Subscription (generally 50 lines) Puzzle is TINY. It only covers 1/6th of the page. 1. Check your printer settings to make sute that you are printing at 100% or "Fit to Page" when the printer options pop-up. Sometimes people have changed this setting for a previous print job and forget that it was set to a lower setting to make somewthing fit 2. This is a bug that happens on RARE occassions with certain computers. We have traced it to happening on computers that have either high resolution, or the with of the resolution of the window is more then 2x the height of your browser window. So if you get a tiny puzzle, try resizing your browser window to be more square. Be sure to let us know if this works - we can't replicate this issue, we just know that on the rare occasion it happens, it is because the browser window is wide and short at a ratio: width is more than 2x the height. We are unsure if making your window more 'square' will fix or not - let us know! How do I adjust the size/color/font etc? HINT: It's in the BLUE MENU! 1. ALL options can be adjusted using the BLUE MENU to the left of the puzzle that is created. If you do not see a blue menu, [click here to see why](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#). 1. First reason this could happen is because you are blocking our ads. Turn off your ad blocker (better yet - whitelist our site in your ad blocker), then REFRESH the page. If this doesn't work, you may need to reboot your computer for the adblocker to stop blocking ads. 2. Second reason is that your browser doesn't have enough RAM to run the Javascript on the page. This usually occurs because too many tabs have been opened or a poorly coded extension is installed that leaks memory. You MUST completely close all instances of your browser to reallocate memory and restart the javascript engine. If you don't know how to accomplish this with Task Manager (CTRL+ALT+DEL on Windows), then you will need to reboot the computer to accomplish the re-allocation of memory. Crossword Problem: Only the title and instructions show up. No puzzle shows up. 1. This is caused because javascript does not have enough memory to generate the crossword puzzle. Usually caused by having too many tabs open or a poorly coded app is installed. REMEDY: Reboot your computer and try again. Alternatively, if you know how to use Task Manager (CTRL+ALT+DEL), you can shut down every single instance of your browser and open a brand new browser and try again (closing all browser tabs by itself will not work). Crossword Problem: Some Word/Clue combos are missing from my worksheet! (2 reasons) 1. Duplicates. If you have 'words' that are duplicates, the duplicate may (or may not) show up. The more duplicates, the more likely you will be missing some/most. If you only have one duplicated word and it is missing from your puzzle, try regenerating the puzzle to see if it will get included. If you have 2 duplicates, you can try regenerating, but less likely all duplicates will make it in the more duplicates you have. 2. This really isn't a reason, but some people will enter 20 clues and see that the puzzle only goes to the number 18. Sometimes words will share a number (i.e. "1 across" and "1 down" would share a number reducing the overall count, so make sure the reason it is gone isn't because of that. Got a different problem not listed above? 1. Please email us: theteacherscorner.net \[at\] gmail \[dot\] com 2. Tell us which puzzle maker you are using 3. Give as much detail about the problem as possible 4. Which browser (chrome, Edge, Safari, Firefox?), and which Operating System (Windows, Mac, Chromebook)? 5. ATTACH a PDF if possible!! [Close Puzzle Problem FAQ's ×](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) ![Save Puzzle Howto](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/includes/save-puzzle-video.png)![saving options](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/images/saveslots/disk-save.svg)[Word List Saving Options](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#)![saving options](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/images/saveslots/disk-save.svg) Save your entered words for our other puzzle makers You can save your WORD LIST for later use, or transfer it to other puzzles! [MUST READ Saving Instructions/FAQs](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) - [**Premium Subscribers**](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) - You get **20 save slots**, all words and clues will be saved - Your word lists are available anywhere and on any device you log in on. - **Not a premium subscriber?**(Premium Users can disregard the next 4 sub-points) - 2 Saving slots, up to 20 words/clues saved each slot (subject to change) - Cookies and Javascript must be enabled to use this option. - You MUST be using the same computer and browser to access previously saved lists. - If you ever delete your browser cookies, all of your saves will be lost. - This option saves your **WORD LIST** (not the puzzle - just the words you entered)! Be advised: our generators make a new puzzle each time you generate them. Therefore, loading a saved list will not generate a puzzle identical to one made at a previous time, it will only keep you from having to re-enter lists. - Click ![save puzzle](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/images/saveslots/disk-save.svg) to save word list to the indicated slot. - Click ![load puzzle](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/images/saveslots/green-refresh.svg) to load a previously saved list. - Word searches and Scrambles have 1 list. Match-ups and Crosswords have 2 lists. Click ![load puzzle](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/images/saveslots/blue-refresh.svg) to load the second list on a single list puzzle. - When saving, only the title and word list(s) are saved, no other options will be preserved. - Once saved, lists can be loaded into other puzzles! [Word Search](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/), [Word Scrambles](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-scramble/), [Crosswords](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/crossword/), [Match-ups](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/match-up/), and [Fill-in-the-Blank](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/fill-in-the-blank/) - Note: some lists may not transfer well to other puzzles. - Tell us if you like this option or have problems in the feedback form below. - Be sure to tell your friends about us! Close FAQ's \[ [x](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#)\] **Saving Options:** 1. **Ad Block**: None 2. **Ad supported**: 2 Word List Save Slots 3. **Premium Subscriber**: 10 Word List Save Slots [How do I turn off my Ad-blocker?](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) Save Slot Title Saved As \| Date saved Reload Slot Empty Empty Empty Empty [Premium Subscribers](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) get 20 Slots that can be saved and retrieved anywhere! **\*NEW\*** You can now save your ' [Fill in the Blank / Cloze](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/fill-in-the-blank/)', and all of our savable puzzles can be generated almost completely with A.I.! **UPPERCASE or lowercase**? It is in the blue menu _after_ making the puzzle under "Advanced Options..." **TIP: Use the "Fun Options" for neat options like:** 1\. Hide "WordSearchPuzzle" but show "Word Search Puzzle" in the word list! and 2\. Hide "SantaClaus" but show "Who visits on Christmas?" Watch the video below for more fun tips! ![Fun Options Video](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/wordsearch-fun-options-video.webp)**Check out our "Fun Options" video, then click the button below!** I understand that by clicking "Fun Options" below, it will lock out my word list above to further changes, and saving options will be unavailable. Fun Options | | | --- | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | | Options below will alter LIST of words visible on the worksheet. Hidden words are not altered. | | **Scramble List Words:** | Scramble Just the Middle Letters
Scramble Entire Word(s) | Scramble Words | | **Change list letters case** | ALL UPPERCASE
all lowercase
Capitalize First Letter | Change case | | **Variation Ideas:** | Tip #1Tip #2Tip #3Tip #4 | | **Tip #1:** Put a clue to the word they need to find. Example below: | | | | --- | --- | | IHaveADream | | **Tip #2:** First: shuffle words. Second: provide clue before shuffled word. Example below: | | | | --- | --- | | IHaveADream | | **Tip #3:** Put spaces in the phrases that you needed to combine for hiding. Example below: | | | | --- | --- | | IHaveADream | | **Tip #4:** Put spaces in the phrases, then scramble (it scrambles the words individually!). Example below: | | | | --- | --- | | IHaveADream | | | **I have read [these simple FAQ's](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#) and wish to proceed!** **\*\*NEW\*\*** You have puzzle customization settings saved from a previous visit (font-size, color, etc). You can delete those settings by [clicking here](https://worksheets.theteacherscorner.net/make-your-own/word-search/#). DELETE my saved customizations. NOTE: you can leave this box unchecked to view the puzzle w/customizations, and then if you don't want them return to this page, tick the box to remove them and return to default settings. Keep this FREE by **Sharing** it! [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fworksheets.theteacherscorner.net%2Fmake-your-own%2Fword-search%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on X](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=FREE%20Word%20Search%20Maker!%20(custom%20shapes!)&url=https%3A%2F%2Fworksheets.theteacherscorner.net%2Fmake-your-own%2Fword-search%2F "Share on X")[Share on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fworksheets.theteacherscorner.net%2Fmake-your-own%2Fword-search%2F "Share on LinkedIn")[Share on Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/submit?url=https%3A%2F%2Fworksheets.theteacherscorner.net%2Fmake-your-own%2Fword-search%2F&title=FREE%20Word%20Search%20Maker!%20(custom%20shapes!) web.title: Free Printable Word Search Maker — Word Search Puzzle PDF
web.description: Create printable word search puzzles and download as word search puzzle PDF instantly. AI word generation, A4 or Letter paper, answer keys included. Free!
web.markdown:
# Free Printable Word Search Maker

Create custom printable word search puzzles and download as high-quality PDFs. Perfect for printing on A4, Letter, or any paper size. Get blank puzzles and answer keys instantly!

[Create Printable Word Search](https://jigsawmake.com/printable-word-search-maker#generator)

## Create Your Printable Word Search

Add words, customize settings, and download print-ready PDFs

Configuration

Word Search

Puzzle Title

Grid Size

10×1015×1520×20Custom

Word List Layout

Columns

Rows

Words 5

AI GenerateClear All

💡Paste words separated by space, comma, or one per line

Difficulty Level

Easy

Medium

Hard

Generate Puzzle

SavePlayShareShow Answer

Export

Word Search PuzzleRBSEMJZEQTAZQRJLKCULDBRAEASKHRGISOGOVMQRCOIIKBIOMNFOJTCUPGSWCMNZAWLHMGNYZTSFUPRJJDXPYMGMOGLHAYHXHZCACKSRDLFUGEEXDTUEFCYBCGRDMAIHYQPEIERCESZRLRCKUJBEEZSQCXCGWOSRLANHAVNZFRNUPFLTACAOWQBZVZDVWSQSEXCQDDVASOXZJKXJIGLTWLPPVFZXJKKMEFind these words:

SCIENCE, MATH, HISTORY, ART, MUSIC


💡

Quick Tips

• Add 5-15 words for best results• Medium adds diagonals, Hard adds backwards• "Show answer" is for preview only• PDF is best for printing

## Why Choose Our Printable Word Search Maker?

🖨️

### Print-Ready PDFs

Download high-quality PDF files optimized for printing. Works perfectly on home printers, office printers, and print shops.

📄

### Any Paper Size

Print on A4, US Letter, A3, or any standard paper size. PDFs scale automatically while maintaining crisp, clear letters.

✅

### Answer Key Included

Every printable word search comes with a separate answer key PDF. Perfect for checking work and helping solvers!

## How to Create a Printable Word Search

Follow these simple steps to create and print your custom word search puzzle

1

### Enter Your Words

Type or paste your word list

2

### Choose Grid Size

Select the perfect size for printing

3

### Download PDF

Get print-ready PDF files instantly

4

### Print & Enjoy

Print your puzzle and start solving!

## Perfect for Printing

### 📚 Classroom Worksheets

Print word search puzzles for entire classes. Perfect for vocabulary practice, spelling tests, and educational activities.

### 🏠 Homeschool Materials

Create printed learning materials for home education. Make learning fun with custom vocabulary word searches.

### 🎉 Party Games

Print themed word searches for birthday parties, baby showers, and weddings. Great offline entertainment!

### ✈️ Travel Entertainment

Print puzzles for road trips, flights, and waiting rooms. No internet needed once printed!

### 👴 Senior Activities

Large print word searches for seniors and nursing homes. Keep minds active with printed puzzles.

### 📰 Newsletter Content

Add word searches to printed newsletters, magazines, and bulletins. Engage readers with interactive content.

## Print-Optimized Features

📄

### PDF Download

High-resolution PDFs for perfect printing

🖨️

### Black & White

Optimized for standard B&W printers

✅

### Answer Keys

Separate printable answer sheets

📏

### Multiple Sizes

A4, Letter, and more paper sizes

🔤

### Clear Fonts

Readable fonts perfect for printing

🆓

### Unlimited Prints

Print as many copies as you need

⚡

### Instant Download

Get your printable PDF in seconds

📐

### Custom Grid Sizes

5x5 to 30x30 options available

## Printable Word Search FAQ

Common questions about printing word search puzzles

How do I create a printable word search puzzle?

Simply enter your words in the word list, choose your preferred grid size, and click generate. Then download your printable word search as a PDF file ready for printing!

What paper sizes are supported for printing?

Our printable word search puzzles are designed to print perfectly on standard paper sizes including A4, US Letter, and A3. The PDF scales automatically to fit your paper size while maintaining clarity.

Can I print the answer key separately?

Yes! When you download your printable word search, you get two separate versions: a blank puzzle for solving and an answer key with all words highlighted. Perfect for teachers and parents!

Is this printable word search maker free?

Absolutely! Our printable word search generator is 100% free. Create unlimited printable puzzles, download PDFs, and print as many copies as you need. No registration required.

How do I get the best print quality?

For best results, download the PDF version and print at 100% scale. Use standard white paper and ensure your printer is set to high quality mode for crisp, clear puzzles with readable letters.

Can I create large print word searches for seniors?

Yes! Choose a smaller grid size with fewer words, or use larger paper like A3 for bigger letters. Our printable format ensures clear, readable puzzles perfect for seniors and those with visual needs.

Does this tool have AI word generation?

Yes! Our AI Generate feature creates themed word lists instantly. Enter a topic, choose difficulty and word count, and the AI handles the rest. Perfect for quickly creating printable puzzles for any occasion.

## More Printable Puzzle Makers

Create different types of printable puzzles

[🔍\\
\\
**Word Search Maker** \\
\\
Full-featured word search maker with all customization options.\\
\\
Create Word Search →](https://jigsawmake.com/word-search-maker "Main word search maker") [✏️\\
\\
**Printable Crossword Maker** \\
\\
Create printable crossword puzzles with answer keys.\\
\\
Create Crossword →](https://jigsawmake.com/printable-crossword-maker "Printable crossword maker") [🧩\\
\\
**Jigsaw Puzzle Maker** \\
\\
Create printable jigsaw puzzles from your images.\\
\\
Create Jigsaw →](https://jigsawmake.com/ "Printable jigsaw puzzle maker")

## Tips & Guides

Learn expert techniques to create better puzzles

[![Free printable word search puzzle maker with PDF download](https://jigsawmake.com/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fprintable-word-search.webp&w=1920&q=75)\\
\\
**Free Printable Word Search Maker: PDF Download Guide** \\
\\
Create and print custom word search puzzles as PDF. Free maker with adjustable difficulty, answer keys, and classroom-ready layouts.\\
\\
Read More →](https://jigsawmake.com/blog/free-printable-word-search-maker-guide "Create and print custom word search puzzles as PDF. Free maker with adjustable difficulty, answer keys, and classroom-ready layouts.") [![Word search puzzle creation guide](https://jigsawmake.com/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fword-search-guide.webp&w=1920&q=75)\\
\\
**Create Engaging Word Search Puzzles: Complete Tutorial** \\
\\
Master the art of creating word search puzzles for education and fun. Learn design tips, difficulty levels, and best practices.\\
\\
Read More →](https://jigsawmake.com/blog/word-search-maker-guide "Master the art of creating word search puzzles for education and fun. Learn design tips, difficulty levels, and best practices.") [![Using printable puzzles in classroom](https://jigsawmake.com/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fclassroom-puzzles.webp&w=1920&q=75)\\
\\
**10 Ways to Use Printable Puzzles in the Classroom** \\
\\
Discover creative ways teachers can use printable jigsaw puzzles and word searches to enhance learning and student engagement.\\
\\
Read More →](https://jigsawmake.com/blog/printable-puzzles-for-classroom "Discover creative ways teachers can use printable jigsaw puzzles and word searches to enhance learning and student engagement.")

[View All Articles →](https://jigsawmake.com/blog "View all articles")

## Ready to Print Your Word Search?Create and download your printable puzzle now!

[Create Printable Word Search](https://jigsawmake.com/printable-word-search-maker#generator)

web.description: Puzzlemaker is a puzzle generation tool for teachers, students and parents. Create and print customized word search, criss-cross, math puzzles, and more
web.markdown:
[![](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/ImmersiveLearning-Evergreen-Banner-728x90.gif)](https://immersive.discoveryeducation.com/?utm_source=adpro&utm_medium=display&utm_campaign=immersive&utm_content=site_launch)

[![Discovery Education](https://www.discoveryeducation.com/wp-content/themes/comet-wp/css/comet/images/de-logo-full.png)](https://www.discoveryeducation.com/)

[![Puzzlemaker Home](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/puzzlemaker-logo-de.png)](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/ "Puzzlemaker Home")

Puzzlemaker is a puzzle generation tool for teachers, students and parents. Create and print customized word search, criss-cross, math puzzles, and more-using your own word lists.

# Word Search Puzzle

To create your word search puzzle, follow the steps below and click the “Create My Puzzle” button when you are done.

![Step 1](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_1.gif)

Enter a title for your puzzleThe title will appear at the top of your page. (49 characters or fewer.)

![Step 2](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_2.gif)

Enter the size of your word search puzzle

Your puzzle can be up to 40 letters by 40 letters and still fit on one page. The optimum puzzle size is 15 letters by 15 letters.

Number of Letters Across

Number of Letters Down

![Step 3](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_3.gif)

Word search puzzle optionsPuzzles where the words do not share any letters are faster to generate and easier to solve. If you choose to share letters as much as possible, the computer will take a little longer to generate the puzzle.

Use each letter only once.

Share letters occasionally.

Share letters as much as possible.

![Step 4](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_4.gif)

Word search puzzle output typeChoose puzzle output as either an image or HTML.

Image

HTML

![Step 5](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_5.gif)

Case optionsChoose if you would like your puzzle to be built using all uppercase, all lowercase or mixed case letters.

All Uppercase Letters

Mixed Uppercase and Lowercase Letters

All Lowercase Letters

![Step 6](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_6.gif)

Enter your wordsSeparate your words with commas, spaces or type each word on a new line. Any character that is not a letter will be considered a space.

[Fill with Sample Data](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/word-search#)

2000 of 2000 characters remaining


![Step 7](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_7.gif)

Show instructions

Check this box if you want instructions to appear below the puzzle.


![Step 8](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/step_8.gif)

Check your puzzlesPuzzlemaker uses a word filter to prevent the random creation of offensive words. After you create your puzzle, proofread it carefully to check for the placement of unintended words created by random letter combinations. You can regenerate your puzzle by selecting the "Back" button in your browser and pressing the "Create My Puzzle" button again.

Create My Puzzle

[![](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/LEGO-BTC-DEBanner-300x250.png)](https://buildthechange.discoveryeducation.com/pages/9c85b368-8745-40d9-bfa3-304486639915?utm_source=adpro&utm_medium=display&utm_campaign=cep_lego)

[![](https://puzzlemaker.discoveryeducation.com/images/SCC-DEBanner-160x600a.png)](https://stemcareerscoalition.discoveryeducation.com/pages/145309f2-1e01-424f-829e-8ac8d0dc55a1?utm_source=adpro&utm_medium=display&utm_campaign=cep_scc&utm_content=educator_resources)

web.title: Word Search Labs - The Word Search Maker
web.description: Word Search Labs is the simplest way to build, print, share and solve word searches online. It's free to use. There are no ads, no watermarks, ...
web.markdown:
Word Search Labs is the simplest way to build, print, share and solve word searches online. It's free to use.

**There are no ads, no watermarks, and no registration is required.**

### How to Make a Word Search

1. Use the form to build your word search. A preview is generated for you automatically.
2. Click "Save"
3. Enjoy your word search. You can print it out, embed it on your own website and share it with anyone (it can be solved online).


### Word Search Generator Features

- Print your wordsearch, with or without the answers.
- Export the word search grid to a PNG (or SVG or text) to embed within your own document or worksheet.
- Share your word search URL with others and they can try solving it online.
- Embed the wordsearch within your own website.

Word Search TitleWords

One word per line. **For question/answer-style word searches**, enter the answer followed by a space, and then the clue.

(example: `Jupiter The largest planet in our solar system`)

Word Placement

→︎

Left to right↓︎

Top to bottom↑︎

Bottom to top↘︎

Top-left to bottom-right↗︎

Bottom-left to top-right←︎

Right to left↙︎

Top-right to bottom-left↖︎

Bottom-right to top-left

Layout

×

RectangleCustomBearDinosaurDolphinElephantHorseLionMonkeyCloverHeartPumpkinTreeTurkeyUncle Sam'MuricaCarSmileTrainCheckersStripesCircleDiamondSpiralStarTriangleXAstronautLunar LanderSaturnStarfleetBaseballBasketballFootballSoccerVolleyball

Preview

## Cat Word Search



1.

cat

2.

Man's best friend

3.

elephant

4.

zebra

5.

lion

6.

hippo

◀▶

Customize Layout

Click on the canvas below to toggle a cell, or click and drag to toggle multiple cells. You can also upload an illustration.

InvertTrimReset

################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################################

Advanced

Filler Alphabet

By default, all the letters in your answers will be used as filler, plus the letters A-Z (unless your word search does not contain A-Z at all).

If you want, you can explicitly enter all the possible filler letters in the field below. For example, enter "AEIOU" to make all filler letters vowels.

Create a passcode

You use this passcode to edit your word search later, and to view the answer key.

Show

Privacy Setting

Public(free!)

Anyone can find, view, solve and print your puzzle. It will be visible in search engines.

Hidden(members only)

Only people who have the direct URL will be able to view/print/solve your puzzle. It will be hidden from search engines.

Private(members only)

Only you can view the puzzle. It cannot be accessed by anyone else, or search engines.

Save
